text: Hey dad, still on for dinner Saturday?
Wouldn't miss it, son. Your mum's doing her roast. Bring Sarah along if she's free
She's keen! What time should we head over?
hey dad, still on for dinner sat? thinking that new pizza place on the high street
yeah works for me, what time were you thinking? 7ish?
7 is perfect, i'll book a table for 3, mum's coming too
Hi love, just checking in, haven't heard from you in a few days x
Hi mum, sorry been mad busy at work! All good here, how are you?
Good good, just pottering about. Ring me when you get a chance x
can you grab Noah from football at 5 today? running late at work
yeah no worries, i'll get him. still on for sleepover fri?
yep fri's fine, i'll pack his bag tmrw morning
Hey Ian, just checking in on you – been a minute since we caught up!
Hey Patricia! All good here, just been keeping busy. How are you doing?
Can't complain, weather's been rough but otherwise fine. Glad you're doing well :)
heyy just checking in, how's ur week going so far
honestly kinda slammed lol but surviving, u?
same tbh, we need to grab coffee soon and vent lol
